title: Add shadcn/ui (Tailwind v4) and render a Card on the homepage
context: Resolve the app root from JOURNAL.md (recorded by 001-scaffold-nextjs: "." repo root, or "web"); run all commands and paths below relative to it. Follow https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/installation/next.
goal: shadcn/ui is initialized in the app via its Bun CLI with Tailwind v4, the Card component is added, imported on the homepage, and it renders correctly in the browser.
acceptance: Initialize shadcn/ui via Bun (e.g. `bunx --bun shadcn@latest init`); components.json exists at the app root.

Tailwind v4 is installed and configured: package.json shows tailwindcss at v4 (^4), and the CSS uses the v4 setup (`@import "tailwindcss";` with `@tailwindcss/postcss` in the PostCSS config) — not a v3 tailwind.config.js `content` + `@tailwind` directives setup.
Run `bunx --bun shadcn@latest add card` from the app root — exits 0; src/components/ui/card.tsx exists.
src/app/page.tsx imports Card (and subcomponents like CardHeader/CardTitle/CardContent) from @/components/ui/card and renders a Card with visible text content.
Run `bun run build` from the app root — exits 0.

Start the dev server on port 3000 in the background, then using Claude browser automation open http://localhost:3000 and confirm the Card renders and visually matches shadcn's default card (bordered, rounded, padded surface containing the header/content text). Capture a screenshot as proof.
Stop the background dev server after verification.
